name: pushout-spec
description: Quint formal model of the boxer pushout exchange protocol

scripts.typecheck: quint typecheck pushout_exchange.qnt && quint typecheck erasure_dilemma.qnt
scripts.test: quint test pushout_exchange.qnt && quint test erasure_dilemma.qnt
scripts.findings: quint run pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=ErasureComplete --max-steps=8 ; quint run erasure_dilemma.qnt --invariant=EnvelopeAvailable --max-steps=6
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run sweep
